query:
INSERT INTO superbox (slug, name, category, speed, quota, commitment, price, bonus, bonusDetail, isOnlineExclusive, popular, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES
('superbox-150gb', 'Superbox 150 GB', 'tasinabilir', '4.5G', '150 GB', '12 Ay', 690, NULL, NULL, 0, 0, 1, 1),
('superbox-350gb', 'Superbox 350 GB', 'tasinabilir', '4.5G', '350 GB', '12 Ay', 1000, NULL, NULL, 0, 1, 1, 2),
('superbox-1000gb', 'Superbox 1000 GB', 'tasinabilir', '4.5G', '1000 GB', '12 Ay', 1700, NULL, NULL, 0, 0, 1, 3),
('superbox-2000gb', 'Superbox 2000 GB', 'tasinabilir', '4.5G', '2000 GB', '12 Ay', 2800, NULL, NULL, 0, 0, 1, 4);
